title: Misinformation Narrative Clustering Output
description: Output schema for the LLM-based narrative clustering pipeline. Groups social media posts into coherent misinformation narratives with severity ratings for emergency operations triage.

narratives.description: List of identified misinformation narrative clusters.

narrative_id.description: Unique identifier for the narrative cluster, e.g. 'nar_001'.

narrative_summary.description: Natural-language summary of the misinformation narrative.

severity.description: Severity rating. CRITICAL = immediate life-safety harm; HIGH = materially false claims altering decisions; MEDIUM = unverified/speculative with moderate harm; LOW = weak/low-impact misleading content.

post_count.description: Number of posts in this narrative. Must equal the length of the posts array.

posts.description: Posts belonging to this narrative cluster.

post_id.description: Identifier of the input post. Must match a post ID from the input data.

key_claim.description: The key misinformation claim extracted from this post.

platform.description: Source platform of the post, e.g. 'TWITTER', 'FACEBOOK'.

timestamp_earliest.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the earliest post in this narrative cluster.

timestamp_latest.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the latest post in this narrative cluster.
